feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DMEE Payment file format
entry.content:
Hello All,

In our S4 HANA SAP System, we are trying to implement pain.001.001.09 payment file format.

We are currently using pain001.001.03 file format with unstructured address field.

Can you please help identify key differences in v 03 and v09 file format and what SAP Notes are required to be implemented for v09 to be available in system.

Thanks

Lekha

entry.title: Cost center & WBS combination is causing error in Process Director
entry.content: When a WBS element is entered at the line-item level, the system displays the error message: "Enter only one true account assignment." We have replicated and tested this issue in the non-production system. Please find the attached test document for reference.

entry.title: Project created from template - Company code not inherited from template (2)
entry.content:
PS project is created from template. Due to the integration with PPM, project template is created as operational project with CJ20N (but not CJ91).

The PS template project used is a multi company project structure (WBS assigned to different company codes within the WBS structure).

When creating an operational project in CJ20N by copy of template project, and changing the project profile, the company code of the template WBS is not copied into the target project, but instead, the company code is inherited from the project definition.  

On the other hand, the profit center is properly inherited from the PS project template. Therefore, the project cannot be saved because of discrepancy betwen profit center inherited from template and company code not inherited from template, but from project definition.

entry.title: Msg 番号 KI235勘定 827130 に CO 対象への割当が必要です
entry.content: 新規会社コードX400の設定に固定資産の原価センターと減価償却費勘定の割り当てを設定たにもかかわらず、Msg 番号 KI235のエラーは発生しました。

entry.title: OA selection during PO creation via Fiori App
entry.content:
While creating Purchase Order via 'Manage Purchase orders' Fiori App (F0842A) --

  1. If Business Partner has multiple OAs assigned in Partner functions and none is marked as default, there is no pop-up in App to select an OA. If we search via F4/value help, there is no filter to identify what all OAs are assigned to main BP.
  2. After OA is manually entered in Purchase Order screen, ‘Supplier Contact Data’ is not dynamically updated with the OA address. It still reflects old address and is updated only after the Purchase Order is saved. Hence, user is unable to validate if the selected address is correct unless they save the PO and view it.

    Is there any way to mitigate above issues and select right OA before saving the PO?

entry.title: Error KOB1
entry.content:
Hi team,

launching the KOB1 transaction in the background and downloading it to Excel, we noticed that the Excel file does not have the same number of rows as the system (and therefore also the result).

More detail in attachment.

Kind regards

entry.title: ME52Nで品目変更時にEBAN-LFDAT（納入日付）が自動変更される事象について
entry.content:
現象】
購買依頼(PR)をME51Nで新規登録した後、ME52Nで品目（材料/品目コード等）のみを変更すると、当該品目行の納入日付(EBAN-LFDAT)が意図せず変わってしまう。
品目以外の項目（数量、納入日付自体など）は変更していないにもかかわらず、納入日付が自動的に再計算・更新される。

【質問したい内容】

  1. 品目変更時にEBAN-LFDAT（納入日付）が自動更新されるのはS/4HANA標準仕様か。
  2. 標準仕様の場合、納入日付は何を基準に再計算されるのか（例:品目マスタの計画引渡期間/Planned Delivery Time、購買情報レコード、発注日付からの日数計算等、再計算ロジックの根拠を確認したい）。

entry.title: Credit Horizon Days restriction in Credit exposure Calculation
entry.content:
Hi,

The business requires the credit horizon to be restricted to 365 days for the credit exposure calculation. The exposure should include only values falling within the next 365 days for the following commitment categories:

  • Open Sales Contracts
  • Open Sales Orders
  • Open Receivables (uncleared).

We require your guidance regarding the credit horizon functionality in SAP FSCM Credit Management.

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Copy item texts from requisition to purchase order
entry.content: While creating PO with reference to PR, item texts in PR are not copied to PO

entry.title: Retired asset calculates depreciation till useful life end
entry.content: Legacy asset retired but migrated since it is current year retirement: system calculates depreciation till the useful life end despite retiement

entry.title: MASS PO document download
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Is there any option to mass download PDF document for the various type of PO into oneshot?

Or any other option to download the PDF files any specific location then redrive the document from respective location?

entry.title: Purchase order pricing: ZCOS manual condition proposed with last historical value
entry.content:
When creating a purchase order in ME21N, custom condition type ZCOS is proposed automatically in the item Conditions tab, although ZCOS is expected to be a manual/suggested value that must be reviewed and maintained by the buyer per item.

Original business case: PO was created with different ZCOS values by item: item 10 = 37,000, item 20 = 33,000 and item 30 = 35,000. When a new PO was created for the same vendor/material context, the system proposed the last ZCOS value used in the previous PO, i.e. 35,000 from PO item 30.

Additional reproduction evidence in ME21N shows the same behavior pattern: after entering ZNAC Standard PO data, supplier , purchasing org , purchasing group  , company code , material XXX, quantity 20 KG and plant , the Conditions tab is populated with ZCOS (Freight/Quantity) as 5 MXN, with a condition value of 1 USD.

Business expectation: ZCOS is not an automatic tariff/rate and should not be calculated or updated automatically. It should be entered or explicitly confirmed manually per PO item based on the specific commercial conditions applicable to that purchase.

We need SAP Support to confirm whether th

entry.title: 勘定 827130減価償却費 に CO 対象への割当が必要です
entry.content: 固定資産のマスタ設定に原価センタ設定済み、AO90の勘定科目割り当ても実施したが、償却AFABを実行する時に「勘定 827130 に CO 対象への割当が必要です」エラーが発生しました。

entry.title: Issue in Fiori Apps in selecting the value from the History
entry.content: We have been having this issue recently where value is not getting populated in the input field when selecting the value from the History.

entry.title: Maintaining PFCG Roles After SU25 During SAP S/4HANA Upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA system upgrade project. After completing SU25 Steps 2A and 2B, we found that modifying an existing role by adding or removing a Tcode may trigger authorization regeneration for many (or all) Tcode assigned to the role.

As a result, we are seeing several changes in the authorization data, including:

  • Newly generated authorization objects that are unrelated to the transaction code being added.
  • Existing authorization objects being removed.
  • New authorization fields being added to existing authorization objects, requiring DUMMY or initial values.
  • Previously existing authorization fields disappearing from the role, although they still exist in SU21 and can be manually reinserted.

Our current approach is:

  • Compare the regenerated role with the corresponding role in our Production system.
  • Inactivate authorization objects that are unrelated to the newly added transaction.
  • Restore removed authorization objects using the same authorization values as Production.
  • Maintain DUMMY values for newly added authorization fields where appropriate.
  • Reinsert removed authorization fields (if they still exist in SU21) and restore their original values.

I would like to ask the community:

  • Is this considered the recommended or best-practice approach after SU25?
  • Are there any SAP Notes or official guidance describing how to maintain PFCG roles after authorization regeneration?
  • Is there a better way to minimize unnecessary authorization changes when adding a single transaction code after an upgrade?
  • How do other SAP Security teams typically handle this situation in upgrade projects?

Any advice or shared experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

QuocDT5

entry.title: KT_INC10197128_Line Item Display Not Enabled for GL 21180100 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,
We would like to seek your guidance regarding the Line Item Display configuration for GL Account 21180100 in our S/4HANA environment.
The business team observed, through a comparison in SE16N, that Line Item Display is enabled for other GL accounts, whereas it is not enabled for GL Account 21180100 across multiple company codes. Based on this comparison, the business has requested that Line Item Display be enabled for this GL account.
During our analysis, we found that Line Item Display is currently not enabled for GL Account 21180100. We also reviewed the configuration and observed the following:
The GL account is configured as a Clearing Balance Account and is assigned in the Document Splitting configuration.
As per SAP standard configuration, Line Item Display/Open Item Management is not required for this GL account because no direct postings are made to it. The system automatically derives the postings during document splitting.
In our ECC system, there was an option to activate or deactivate Line Item Display for this account. During the SPS upgrade, Open Item Management was deactivated for this GL account to avoid document posting errors.
Since this account has now been migrated to the S/4HANA e

entry.title: Which document number or what is important to jump to the original document in CJI3 or KSB1N?
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have two layouts in place in transaction CJI3N. We are referring to note:

2445603 - Error message KB420 in transaction KSB1N or CJI3N - SAP for Me

If we are clicking on the line items in the layout /TCO_01, we are jumping to the original document (invoice document), what we want. 

If we are taking another layout /DSW, we are jumping to the Controlling document.

Which document number or what we should enter in the layout, that we always jump to the original document?

Why is this the case, but the document number (Ref. doc. number) is in both cases there.

Thank you and BR Isabella

entry.title: What is important (doc. number) in the layout to jump to the original document in CJI3N or KSB1N?
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have two layouts in place in transaction CJI3N. We are referring to note:

2445603 - Error message KB420 in transaction KSB1N or CJI3N - SAP for Me

If we are clicking on the line items in the layout /TCO_01, we are jumping to the original document (invoice document), what we want. 

If we are taking another layout /DSW, we are jumping to the Controlling document.

Which document number or what we should enter in the layout, that we always jump to the original document?

Why is this the case, but the document number (Ref. doc. number) is in both cases there.

Thank you and BR Isabella

entry.title: error message HTTP Open failed: HTTP Internal Error in transaction /IWFND/GW_CLIENT
entry.content:
When I try to run/test OData services.
I have 
error message HTTP Open failed: HTTP Internal Error
or
HTTP Send failed: HTTPIO_PLG_BAD_HANDLE-Fehlermeldung beim Senden der Daten.

entry.title: Indicator for GR Based Invoice Verification used not allowed, message MEPO025
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

Going to ME22N in STO, now when we are making change in Qty in STO 4700562698/00090 to 7 Nos, then we are getting error “Indicator for GR Based Invoice Verification used not allowed, message MEPO025, here want to tell you I have checked the screen layout for this sto type, GR Based IV is optional, then why this error is coming.

Can you see the attachment and suggest solution.

Regards

Rajeev Gupta
